title: The White Black Sheep
writer: Agnes Pat McKenna, Violet E. Powell, Jerome N. Wilson
actors: Richard Barthelmess, Patsy Ruth Miller, Constance Howard
plot: Robert Kincairn, the dissolute son of a British colonel, is gallant enough to take the blame for a robbery perpetrated by his fiancee Enid. Thrown out of his home, he changes his name and join the army.
